name: Update User Profile
description: Updates the authenticated user's profile. Supports multipart form data for passport photo upload with brightness/sharpness validation. Body is parsed through ParseJSONPipe before validation.

id.description: The unique identifier of the user (MongoDB ObjectId)

requestPayload.passportPhoto: string (optional, base64 or file, max 1MB, min 350x450px)

files.constraints: Must be minimum 350x450px, validated for brightness and sharpness

validation: passportPhoto: validated for file size (max 1MB), dimensions (min 350x450), brightness, and sharpness

errorResponses.description: Returned when the update operation fails due to validation or processing error
Returned when an unexpected server error occurs

name: Get Verification History
description: Retrieves the verification history for a specific reference associated with a user.

id.description: The unique identifier of the user (MongoDB ObjectId)

refId.description: The unique identifier of the reference (MongoDB ObjectId)

errorResponses.description: Returned when the specified user or reference ID does not exist

name: Get Verification Tokens
description: Retrieves verification tokens and links for a user's neighbor and family references.

id.description: The unique identifier of the user (MongoDB ObjectId)

errorResponses.description: Returned when the specified user ID does not exist

name: Get Verification Details
description: Retrieves applicant and reference details for verification. This is a PUBLIC endpoint that bypasses JWT authentication.

errorResponses.description: Returned when the token is not found or has expired

name: Verify Reference
description: Submits a reference verification response. This is a PUBLIC endpoint that bypasses JWT authentication.

requestExample.comments: I have known John for over 5 years as a neighbor.

errorResponses.description: Returned when the token is invalid or expired
Returned when no reference matches the provided token

name: Initiate Verification
description: Initiates the verification process for a user. No request body required.

id.description: The unique identifier of the user (MongoDB ObjectId)

errorResponses.description: Returned when the specified user ID does not exist

name: Change User Role
description: Changes a user's role. Requires GLOBAL_ADMIN privileges.

id.description: The unique identifier of the user (MongoDB ObjectId)

requestExample.reason: Promoted to administrator for Aba South LGA

errorResponses.description: Returned when the authenticated user does not have GLOBAL_ADMIN role
Returned when the specified user ID does not exist

name: Get Role History
description: Retrieves the role assignment history for a user, sorted by createdAt in descending order.

id.description: The unique identifier of the user (MongoDB ObjectId)

errorResponses.description: Returned when the authenticated user lacks ROLE_READ permission
Returned when the specified user ID does not exist

name: Get Available Roles
description: Returns the list of assignable roles (global_admin is filtered out).

errorResponses.description: Returned when no valid JWT token is provided

name: Update User (Admin)
description: Updates a user's details by an admin. Requires GLOBAL_ADMIN or ADMIN role.

id.description: The unique identifier of the user (MongoDB ObjectId)

errorResponses.description: Returned when the authenticated user does not have GLOBAL_ADMIN or ADMIN role
Returned when the specified user ID does not exist

name: Toggle User Status
description: Toggles a user's active/inactive status. Requires GLOBAL_ADMIN privileges.

id.description: The unique identifier of the user (MongoDB ObjectId)

successResponse.message: string (User successfully activated or User successfully deactivated)

errorResponses.description: Returned when the authenticated user does not have GLOBAL_ADMIN role
Returned when the specified user ID does not exist

name: Get Role Statistics
description: Returns the count of users per role along with their permission descriptions.

errorResponses.description: Returned when no valid JWT token is provided

name: Get Analytics
description: Returns analytics data including monthly user growth, request volume, processing times, and request type distribution. Requires GLOBAL_ADMIN or ADMIN role.

errorResponses.description: Returned when the authenticated user does not have GLOBAL_ADMIN or ADMIN role

name: Get Member Statistics
description: Returns member statistics including total count, age distribution, gender distribution, and state distribution. Requires GLOBAL_ADMIN or ADMIN role.

errorResponses.description: Returned when the authenticated user does not have GLOBAL_ADMIN or ADMIN role

name: Get Dashboard Statistics
description: Returns comprehensive dashboard statistics including totals, user counts, trends, payments, request statuses, top LGAs, and recent activities. Requires GLOBAL_ADMIN or ADMIN role.

errorResponses.description: Returned when the authenticated user does not have GLOBAL_ADMIN or ADMIN role

name: Export Dashboard PDF
description: Generates and returns a PDF report of the dashboard data as a downloadable file.
successExample: Binary PDF file stream with headers Content-Type: application/pdf and Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="dashboard-report.pdf"

errorResponses.description: Returned when the PDF generation process fails

name: Get Current User
description: Returns the full profile of the currently authenticated user based on the JWT token.

errorResponses.description: Returned when no valid JWT token is provided

name: Get Users By LGA
description: Returns users filtered by Local Government Area. Requires SUPPORT_ADMIN role. If lga query param is provided, returns filtered results; otherwise returns all users.

lga.description: Local Government Area to filter by

errorResponses.description: Returned when the authenticated user does not have SUPPORT_ADMIN role

name: Get Trends
description: Returns registration trend data for a specific LGA, broken down by monthly, daily, and hourly aggregations.

lga.description: Local Government Area to get trends for

errorResponses.description: Returned when the required lga query parameter is not provided

name: Get Demographics
description: Returns demographic data for a specific LGA including gender, age, and combined group distributions.

lga.description: Local Government Area to get demographics for

errorResponses.description: Returned when the required lga query parameter is not provided

name: Get Kindred Activity
description: Returns kindred-level activity counts for a specific LGA.

lga.description: Local Government Area to get kindred activity for

errorResponses.description: Returned when the required lga query parameter is not provided

name: Get Recent Activities
description: Returns a list of recent activities for a specific LGA.

lga.description: Local Government Area to get recent activities for

successExample.content: John Doe submitted a Certificate of Origin request
Jane Smith's Identity Card was approved

errorResponses.description: Returned when the required lga query parameter is not provided

name: Get LGA Request Trends
description: Returns request counts per LGA within the specified date range.

errorResponses.description: Returned when an unexpected error occurs while fetching LGA trends

name: Initialize Dashboard
description: Returns initial dashboard data including analytics, activity feed, and summary statistics for the authenticated user.

errorResponses.description: Returned when no valid JWT token is provided

name: Get Full Analytics
description: Returns comprehensive analytics data including demographics, trends, transactions, and LGA trends. Optionally filtered by LGA.

errorResponses.description: Returned when no valid JWT token is provided

name: Get User Profile
description: Retrieves a specific user's full profile by their ID.

id.description: The unique identifier of the user (MongoDB ObjectId)

errorResponses.description: Returned when the specified user ID does not exist

name: Get Paginated Users
description: Returns a paginated list of all users. Requires GLOBAL_ADMIN or ADMIN role.

errorResponses.description: Returned when the authenticated user does not have GLOBAL_ADMIN or ADMIN role
